REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION, 501, CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION AND NOTICE OF HEARING, ADVANCED FROM APR-29-2019 TO REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTIONS CALENDAR AT APR-29-2019 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 501.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION AND NOTICE OF HEARING TEVEN OSBORNE'S CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION IS DENIED. POSSESSION IS NOT AT ISSUE IN THIS ACTION, THERE IS NO JUDGMENT AND NO WRIT IN THIS ACTION. ACTION HAS BEEN DISMISSED ON DECEMBER 5, 2018. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: MARIA OLOPERNES; NOT REPORTED; D501.

calendar.matters:
Claim Of Right To Possession And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Advanced From Apr-29-19 To Apr-29-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Claim Of Right To Possession And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Verleana D. Green, Esq., 510-372-4718, for Defendant Severa Reed, appearing via COURT CALL.
Self-represented Steven Osborne is present.

Argued. Court having reviewed the pleadings and heard the arguments, adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Steven Osborne's Claim of Right to Possession is DENIED. Possession is not at issue in this action, there is no judgment and no writ in this action. Action has been dismissed on December 5, 2018. Prevailing party to submit proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Maria Olopernes; Not Reported; D501.
